title: Create: Cardboard Weapon Pack
body:
## Description This pack contains models for the Cardboard Sword It's fun :) ## List of weapons (current version)
Spoiler
- Cardboard Real Sword

- Cardboard Axe

- Cardboard Hammer

- Cardboard Hand

## Installing The resource pack must be placed in the resourcepacks folder in the .minecraft directory Default: * Windows: **C:\\Users\\%USERNAME%\\AppData\\Roaming\\.minecraft\\resourcepacks\\** * Linux: **~/.minecraft/resourcepacks** Next, in Minecraft, go to **[Settings]** -> **[Resource Packs]** -> Select the desired pack -> **[Done]** ## Requirements * Installed [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) * Installed [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [CIT Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/citreforged) ## Feedback You can contact us via [email](mailto:mystyhaddock355@ya.ru) or [Discord](https://discord.com/users/817075264567115806). ## Finance/referal support [![🚀 Host with aéza – Fast, Secure & Affordable](https://img.shields.io/badge/aéza%20vps%20hosting-%E2%82%AC4.94%2Fmo%2B-purple?style=for-the-badge&logo=linux)](https://aeza.net/?ref=724303) Finance... Em... [maybe crypto](https://pay.cryptocloud.plus/pos/aCUcT6XdSnMcC16Z)? ## My (our) projects
